languages.text: "Смотреть на жизнь через призму долга — разумно. Нельзя забывать ради чего существуют мои амбиции. В этой точке зрения есть резон — и немалый". {n}Техножрец с деланно безразличным видом наблюдает за тем, как наконечники инъекторов раз за разом погружаются в его бледную плоть.{/n} "В конце концов, любой организм есть машина Омниссии, и цель его — служить человечеству".

"Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."
languages.original_text: "Смотреть на жизнь через призму долга — разумно. Нельзя забывать ради чего существуют мои амбиции. В этой точке зрения есть резон — и немалый". {n}Техножрец с деланно безразличным видом наблюдает за тем, как наконечники инъекторов раз за разом погружаются в его бледную плоть.{/n} "В конце концов, любой организм есть машина Омниссии, и цель его — служить человечеству".

There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

"Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

"Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

languages.text: "Das Leben durch das Prisma der Pflicht zu betrachten, ist weise. Ich darf den Zweck meiner Bestrebungen nie vergessen. Es spricht nicht wenig für dieses ausgesprochen vernünftige Argument." {n}Der Techpriester beobachtet mit gespielter Gelassenheit, wie sich die Spitzen der Injektoren immer wieder in sein blasses Fleisch bohren.{/n} "Immerhin ist jeder Organismus eine Maschine des Omnissiah, deren Zweck es ist, der Menschheit zu dienen."
languages.original_text: "Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Das Leben durch das Prisma der Pflicht zu betrachten, ist weise. Ich darf den Zweck meiner Bestrebungen nie vergessen. Es spricht nicht wenig für dieses ausgesprochen vernünftige Argument." {n}Der Techpriester beobachtet mit gespielter Gelassenheit, wie sich die Spitzen der Injektoren immer wieder in sein blasses Fleisch bohren.{/n} "Immerhin ist jeder Organismus eine Maschine des Omnissiah, deren Zweck es ist, der Menschheit zu dienen."

languages.text: « Il est sage de voir la vie comme un devoir. Je ne dois pas oublier le but de mes ambitions. Votre argument repose sur un raisonnement plus que solide. » {n}Le technoprêtre observe avec une nonchalance délibérée les pointes des injecteurs tandis qu'elles s'enfoncent dans sa peau pâle de façon répétée.{/n} « Après tout, chaque organisme est une machine de l'Omnimessie dont le but est de servir l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Il est sage de voir la vie comme un devoir. Je ne dois pas oublier le but de mes ambitions. Votre argument repose sur un raisonnement plus que solide. » {n}Le technoprêtre observe avec une nonchalance délibérée les pointes des injecteurs tandis qu'elles s'enfoncent dans sa peau pâle de façon répétée.{/n} « Après tout, chaque organisme est une machine de l'Omnimessie dont le but est de servir l'humanité. »

languages.text: “从职责的角度审视生命是明智之举。我绝不能忘记自身追求的根本意义。这个论点极具说服力。”{n}技术神甫若无其事地注视着注射器针头一次次刺入他苍白的皮肤。{/n}“毕竟，一切有机体都是欧姆尼赛亚的机器，其存在之意义，就是服务人类。”
languages.original_text: "Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

traits.locale_text: “从职责的角度审视生命是明智之举。我绝不能忘记自身追求的根本意义。这个论点极具说服力。”{n}技术神甫若无其事地注视着注射器针头一次次刺入他苍白的皮肤。{/n}“毕竟，一切有机体都是欧姆尼赛亚的机器，其存在之意义，就是服务人类。”

languages.text: «Mirar la vida a través del prisma del deber es una decisión sabia. No debo olvidar el propósito de mis ambiciones. Es un razonamiento más que sólido». {n}El tecnosacerdote observa con indiferencia intencionada cómo las puntas de los inyectores se clavan una y otra vez en sus pálidas carnes.{/n} «A fin de cuentas, todo organismo es una máquina del Omnissiah, creada para servir a la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Mirar la vida a través del prisma del deber es una decisión sabia. No debo olvidar el propósito de mis ambiciones. Es un razonamiento más que sólido». {n}El tecnosacerdote observa con indiferencia intencionada cómo las puntas de los inyectores se clavan una y otra vez en sus pálidas carnes.{/n} «A fin de cuentas, todo organismo es una máquina del Omnissiah, creada para servir a la Humanidad».

languages.text: 「義務という観点から人生を眺めるのは賢明だ。私は自らの野心の目的を決して忘れてはならない。その論には、確かに少なからぬ道理がある。」{n}技術司祭は、注射器の先端が青白い肉に次々と突き立てられていくのを、わざとらしいほど無頓着に眺めている。{/n}「結局のところ、あらゆる有機体はオムニサイアの機械であり、その目的は人類に奉仕することにあるのだから。」
languages.original_text: "Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「義務という観点から人生を眺めるのは賢明だ。私は自らの野心の目的を決して忘れてはならない。その論には、確かに少なからぬ道理がある。」{n}技術司祭は、注射器の先端が青白い肉に次々と突き立てられていくのを、わざとらしいほど無頓着に眺めている。{/n}「結局のところ、あらゆる有機体はオムニサイアの機械であり、その目的は人類に奉仕することにあるのだから。」

languages.text: "Yaşama görev prizmasından bakmak bilgece. Hırslarımın amacını asla unutmamalıyım. Bu argümanda hiç de azımsanmayacak, sağlam bir mantık var." {n}Tekno Rahip, enjektörlerin uçlarının tekrar tekrar soluk etine saplanışını kasıtlı bir kayıtsızlıkla izliyor.{/n} "Sonuçta her organizma, Hermesih'in bir makinesidir ve amaçları İnsanlığa hizmet etmektir."
languages.original_text: "Looking at life through the prism of duty is wise. I must never forget the purpose of my ambitions. There is sound reasoning to that argument, more than a little." {n}The Tech-Priest watches with deliberate nonchalance as the tips of the injectors plunge into his pale flesh again and again.{/n} "After all, every organism is a machine of the Omnissiah, and its purpose is to serve humanity."
